item.changelog:
What's new in 2.3.5.0

  • Created SCD files should now open and verify more reliably in VFXEditor.
  • Adding songs from your computer now opens the file picker correctly.
  • Settings now detect available SCD paths from the selected Penumbra mod and let you choose one from a dropdown.
  • New songs are added to the playlist's existing SCD folder instead of creating extra folders.
  • Improved handling for looping, background music fading, distance fading, and playback channel options.
  • General reliability improvements for saving and reloading playlists.

For full details see the release page: https://github.com/solona-m/Pickles-Playlist-Editor/releases
